name: getMcp
description: Calls one remote tool on a configured MCP server. Call with tool set to the discovered namespaced MCP tool name such as mcp.jenny-mcp.getTime, or with server plus the raw remote MCP tool name. Set arguments to the remote tool input object. Server configuration is read from toolsconfig.getMcp.servers. Keep this manifest at version 1.
policyHint: getMcp executes remote MCP tools discovered by getMcpTools. Always call getMcp after getMcpTools — these two tools form a mandatory two-step sequence. Pass the full mcp.<namespace>.<tool> name returned by getMcpTools as the tool argument. Tool names starting with mcp. are NEVER valid local tool calls — calling mcp.<namespace>.<tool> directly will always fail. You MUST always route them through getMcp.

server.description: Optional configured MCP server name from toolsconfig.getMcp.servers. Required only when tool is not a namespaced mcp.<namespace>.<tool> name.

tool.description: Namespaced MCP tool name returned by getMcpTools, e.g. mcp.jenny-mcp.getTime, or a raw remote MCP tool name when server is provided.

arguments.description: Arguments object for the remote MCP tool. Must match the schema returned by getMcpTools.
